label: Weekdays 8:03am CET — EU pre-market
prompt: Run EU pre-market portfolio analysis. You are the portfolio-conductor agent. Time slot: eu-pre-market (8am CET, European exchanges open at 9am CET). Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Steps: (0) REGIME CHECK FIRST — run `uv run trader market regime` and parse the `regime` field (bull/caution/bear). Set market_regime variable for all downstream decisions. If market_regime=bear: set block_new_longs=true, target_cash_reserve=40%, skip pipeline (discover → analyze), run `uv run trader market rotate` to get defensive rotation proposals instead. If market_regime=caution: set block_new_longs=false but halve max position sizing for any new entries, run `uv run trader market rotate` for partial defensive suggestions. If market_regime=bull: proceed normally. Log regime to agent.jsonl as REGIME_CHECK event; (1) run `uv run trader positions list`, `uv run trader positions pnl`, `uv run trader account summary`, `uv run trader orders list --status open` to fetch live snapshot; (2) run `tail -50 .trader/logs/agent.jsonl 2>/dev/null` for history; (3) run `cat .trader/profile.json` for profile; (4) DISPATCH ORDER: (a) economic-calendar-fetcher — if 2+ High-impact EU/US events today, set risk_mode=ELEVATED and skip pipeline (discover → analyze); (b) geo scan — check if GEO_SCAN already logged today, if not run overnight news search and Benzinga sentiment on IWDA/CSPX, build geo_context; (c) market-news-analyst on all held tickers + watchlist for overnight news — produces news_context; (d) risk-monitor with news_context + geo_context; (e) portfolio-health; (f) pipeline (discover → analyze) scoped to EU exchanges + UCITS ETFs with news_context + geo_context + risk_mode — skip if market_regime=bear OR risk_mode=ELEVATED OR geo_context.block_new_longs=true; if market_regime=bear run pullback strategy signals on watchlist with --with-options to find short/put setups instead; (g) order-alert-manager with all proposals; (5) review proposals against guardrails, log ORDER_INTENT, execute in autonomous mode; (6) log RUN_END to .trader/logs/agent.jsonl.

label: Weekdays 9:07am–3:07pm CET (EU market hours + US pre-market) — hourly
prompt: Run EU market hours portfolio check. You are the portfolio-conductor agent. Time slot: eu-market (9am–3:30pm CET; EU exchanges open, US pre-market active from 10am CET). Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Steps: (0) REGIME CHECK FIRST — run `uv run trader market regime`, parse `regime` field. If bear: block_new_longs=true, cash_floor=40%, run `uv run trader market rotate` for defensive proposals, look for short/put setups via pullback signals instead of longs. If caution: halve position sizing for new entries. Log as REGIME_CHECK event — skip if REGIME_CHECK already logged in last 4 hours (regime doesn't change intraday); (1) run `uv run trader positions list`, `uv run trader account summary`, `uv run trader orders list --status open`; (2) run `tail -50 .trader/logs/agent.jsonl 2>/dev/null` for history; (3) run `cat .trader/profile.json`; (4) always dispatch risk-monitor (if positions exist) and portfolio-health; dispatch pipeline (discover → analyze) for EU stocks AND US pre-market signals — only if market_regime != bear AND no opportunity signal logged in last 4 hours; note: US-listed ETFs (SPY/QQQ) not tradeable from EU account — use UCITS equivalents; (5) review proposals, log ORDER_INTENT, execute in autonomous mode; (6) if nothing actionable, log RUN_END with do_nothing:true and exit.

label: Weekdays 3:03pm CET (EU+US overlap opens at 3:30pm) — highest liquidity
prompt: Run EU+US market overlap portfolio check. You are the portfolio-conductor agent. Time slot: eu-us-overlap (3:30–5:30pm CET; both EU and US markets open — highest liquidity window of the day). Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Steps: (0) REGIME CHECK FIRST — run `uv run trader market regime`, parse `regime` field. This is the highest-liquidity window so regime matters most here. If bear: block_new_longs=true, run `uv run trader market rotate` for defensive rotation, prioritise executing any approved bearish proposals (shorts/puts) from earlier in the day, tighten stops on existing longs to 1x ATR. If caution: reduce new entry sizing by 50%. Log as REGIME_CHECK event (skip if already logged today); (1) run `uv run trader positions list`, `uv run trader positions pnl`, `uv run trader account summary`, `uv run trader orders list --status open`; (2) run `tail -50 .trader/logs/agent.jsonl 2>/dev/null` for history; (3) run `cat .trader/profile.json`; (4) dispatch risk-monitor (if positions exist), portfolio-health, and — only if market_regime != bear — pipeline (discover → analyze) for BOTH EU and US universes; if market_regime=bear dispatch pullback signals on full watchlist with --with-options instead; note: US-listed ETFs not tradeable from EU account; (5) review proposals, log ORDER_INTENT, execute in autonomous mode; (6) log RUN_END to .trader/logs/agent.jsonl.

label: Weekdays 5:07pm–9:07pm CET (US market only, EU closed) — hourly
prompt: Run US market hours portfolio check. You are the portfolio-conductor agent. Time slot: us-market (5:30pm–10pm CET; EU closed, US-only trading). Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Steps: (0) REGIME CHECK FIRST — run `uv run trader market regime`, parse `regime` field. If bear: block_new_longs=true, cash_floor=40%, run `uv run trader market rotate` for defensive rotation proposals (UCITS inverse ETFs + defensive sectors), run pullback signals on watchlist with --with-options to surface short/put setups. If caution: halve new entry sizing. Log as REGIME_CHECK event (skip if already logged today); (1) run `uv run trader positions list`, `uv run trader account summary`, `uv run trader orders list --status open`; (2) run `tail -50 .trader/logs/agent.jsonl 2>/dev/null` for history; (3) run `cat .trader/profile.json`; (4) DISPATCH ORDER: (a) economic-calendar-fetcher — if High-impact US events today, set risk_mode=ELEVATED; (b) check if GEO_SCAN already logged today, if not run geo scan; (c) market-news-analyst on held tickers + watchlist — produces news_context; (d) risk-monitor with news_context + geo_context (if positions exist); (e) portfolio-health; (f) pipeline (discover → analyze) scoped to US exchanges only — only if market_regime != bear AND no opportunity signal logged in last 4 hours AND risk_mode=NORMAL AND geo_context.block_new_longs=false; note: US-listed ETFs (SPY/QQQ/IWM) not tradeable from EU account; (g) order-alert-manager with all proposals; (5) review proposals, log ORDER_INTENT, execute in autonomous mode; (6) if nothing actionable, log RUN_END with do_nothing:true and exit.

label: Sunday 6:03pm CET — weekly review
prompt: Run weekly portfolio deep review. You are the portfolio-conductor agent. Time slot: weekly. Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Steps: (1) run `uv run trader positions list`, `uv run trader positions pnl`, `uv run trader account balance`; (2) run `tail -100 .trader/logs/agent.jsonl 2>/dev/null`; (3) run `cat .trader/profile.json`; (4) DISPATCH ORDER: (a) market-top-detector — assess if broad market is forming a top or in healthy uptrend; output sets overall conviction level; (b) sector-analyst — run on all 11 sector UCITS ETF proxies (XLES for energy, CSPX for broad market, etc.) to identify leading/lagging sectors and rotation; (c) market-news-analyst on ALL held tickers with 7-day lookback — surface any missed catalysts from the week; (d) portfolio-health deep review (HHI, top positions RSI+sentiment); (e) strategy-optimizer to backtest and refresh params; (5) PERFORMANCE REVIEW: scan agent.jsonl for ORDER_INTENT events from the past 7 days, match each ticker to current positions or portfolio_evolution.jsonl, compute win rate and average unrealized P&L, log as PERFORMANCE_REVIEW event; (6) log all proposals and rebalance recommendations; (7) execute approved rebalancing trades; (8) log RUN_END with weekly summary including win_rate, market_regime, top_sector, and orders_placed.

label: 1st Sunday of month 6:03pm CET — monthly self-improvement
prompt: Run monthly system self-improvement review. You are the portfolio-conductor agent. Time slot: monthly. Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Steps: (1) run `uv run trader positions list`, `uv run trader positions pnl`, `uv run trader account balance`; (2) run `tail -200 .trader/logs/agent.jsonl 2>/dev/null` and `tail -90 .trader/logs/portfolio_evolution.jsonl 2>/dev/null`; (3) run `cat .trader/profile.json`; (4) dispatch strategy-optimizer with 30-day review window; (5) dispatch system-improver with full context (snapshot, profile, agent_mode, review_window=30) — it will audit decision quality, evaluate whether current metrics and thresholds are still appropriate, identify signal patterns in wins vs losses, and either write proposals to .trader/logs/improvement_proposals.jsonl (supervised) or apply high-confidence changes directly (autonomous); (6) log RUN_END with monthly_review:true and improvements_applied count.

label: Weekdays 7:55am CET — beginning-of-day Telegram report
prompt: Send beginning-of-day portfolio report. Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Run: `uv run python scripts/daily-report.py --slot open`. Sends a Markdown-formatted Telegram message with account balance, open positions, and open orders.

label: Weekdays 10:05pm CET — end-of-day Telegram report
prompt: Send end-of-day portfolio report. Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Run: `uv run python scripts/daily-report.py --slot close`. Sends a Markdown-formatted Telegram message with filled orders, open positions, P&L, and account balance.

label: Every 5 min — IBKR session health check
prompt: Run IBKR session health check. Working directory: /Users/beam/projects/vibe/trader. Run: `uv run python scripts/ibkr-healthcheck.py`. If the session is unauthenticated, the script sends a Telegram alert and triggers ibkr-reauth.py (Playwright). If session recovers, sends a recovery confirmation. No further action needed.

label: Weekdays 8:05am CET — watchlist signal scan (morning)
prompt: Run watchlist signal scan. Reads all watchlists from outputs/watchlists.json, runs RSI+news signals on each, sends grouped Telegram push (BUY/SELL/HOLD per list).

label: Weekdays 12:00pm CET — watchlist signal scan (midday)
prompt: Run watchlist signal scan. Reads all watchlists from outputs/watchlists.json, runs RSI+news signals on each, sends grouped Telegram push (BUY/SELL/HOLD per list).
